description: High-level system overview documenting the ERP system's key components, architecture, and core business processes with focus on order-to-cash workflow
Detailed documentation of the order-to-cash workflow implementation, including order lifecycle, approval rules, and payment processing with GST calculations
Comprehensive documentation of data models focusing on order, inventory, production, and dealer management entities with their relationships and constraints
Detailed documentation of core accounting algorithms including FIFO costing, GST calculations, credit limit validation, and multi-company accounting rules
Documentation of inventory management system including batch tracking, reservations, FIFO implementation, and integration with production planning
